channel.title: Comments for page "Turn Around Brighteyes"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Turn Around Brighteyes"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's a very interesting perspective to look at things like God 343 and was a very interesting read over all
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks and welcome to my first posted Tale. This was a line of thinking inspired by the work I've been doing on SCP-4401 and elements of vague, cosmic/eldritch horror still taking shape in my mind.

I hope it's enjoyable for you and at least a tiny bit thought-provoking.
